name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem?

A clear and concise description of the problem. E.g. "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Describe the Solution You'd Like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Component

Which part of the app does this relate to? (check all that apply)

- [ ] Surveillance / Sentry mode
- [ ] Camera (AVM / panoramic)
- [ ] Recording / playback
- [ ] Trip detection / analytics
- [ ] ABRP telemetry
- [ ] Telegram bot / daemon
- [ ] MQTT
- [ ] Streaming
- [ ] Web UI dashboard
- [ ] Vehicle data (BYD APIs)
- [ ] OTA updates
- [ ] UI / settings
- [ ] New component / integration

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Would You Be Willing to Contribute This?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to work on this
- [ ] I could help with testing
- [ ] No, just suggesting

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
